SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-14-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHAOCUI CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHUNAI HUANG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, SHAOCUI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUANG, SHUNAI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
